question: Products with highest return rate
sql:
WITH ProductReturnCounts AS (
    SELECT
        oi.product_id,
        COUNT(oi.id) AS total_ordered,
        COUNT(r.id) AS total_returned
    FROM order_items oi
    LEFT JOIN returns r ON oi.order_id = r.order_id
    GROUP BY oi.product_id
)
SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    CAST(prc.total_returned AS REAL) / prc.total_ordered AS return_rate
FROM ProductReturnCounts prc
JOIN products p ON prc.product_id = p.id
WHERE prc.total_ordered > 0
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 500;
answer: The products with the highest return rates are Coffee Maker (50%), Yoga Mat (25%), and Running Shoes (25%).

question: Products with highest return rate
sql:
WITH ProductReturnCounts AS (
    SELECT
        oi.product_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders_with_product,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.order_id) AS returned_orders_with_product
    FROM order_items oi
    LEFT JOIN returns r ON oi.order_id = r.order_id
    GROUP BY oi.product_id
)
SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    CASE
        WHEN prc.total_orders_with_product = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE (CAST(prc.returned_orders_with_product AS NUMERIC) / prc.total_orders_with_product) * 100.0
    END AS return_rate
FROM products p
JOIN ProductReturnCounts prc ON p.id = prc.product_id
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 500;
answer: The products with the highest return rates are Coffee Maker, Running Shoes, Yoga Mat, Wireless Earbuds, and Resistance Bands.
